privileged_info_summary: The task involves assembling three synthetic video clips (960x540 resolution, 24fps, 2 seconds each) in Blender's Video Sequence Editor. Clips are synthetically generated with lavfi color backgrounds (blue, amber, green) and text overlays during task setup. Required metadata are verified: footage directory at /home/ga/BlenderProjects/footage, expected blend file at /home/ga/BlenderProjects/video_edit.blend, expected rendered output at /home/ga/BlenderProjects/final_edit.mp4, required text keywords 'bmw' and 'showcase' (for 'BMW Showcase Reel' title), minimum 3 movie strips, and minimum 1 transition effect.
